tests.name: CREATE
tests.reason: Record not found within timeout. CDC sync Lambda (lambda/cdc_sync/index.py) is not deployed to AWS — only code exists in repo. The existing cdc_processor Lambda prepares records but does not embed+upsert to Turbopuffer.

tests.name: UPDATE
tests.reason: CREATE failed — cannot validate UPDATE without indexed record

tests.name: DELETE
tests.reason: CREATE failed — DELETE would be vacuously true (record was never indexed)

root_cause: CDC sync Lambda (lambda/cdc_sync/index.py) has not been deployed to AWS. The AppFlow -> S3 -> EventBridge pipeline exists and fires, but the downstream Lambda that performs denormalize -> embed -> upsert is code-only. Deployment required: (1) CDK deploy of cdc_sync Lambda, (2) wire into EventBridge rule or Step Functions, (3) IAM permissions for S3/Bedrock/Turbopuffer/SQS/CloudWatch.
prior_run_note: First run on 2026-03-16 produced false DELETE PASS because record was never indexed. Script fixed to skip UPDATE/DELETE when CREATE fails.
